Team Uniforms

Custom Team Uniform Manufacturer: Everything You Need to Know

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 10 min read
Home / Blog / Custom Team Uniform Manufacturer: Everything You Need to Know

Whether you outfit a youth soccer club, a school basketball team, a corporate league, or a professional esports squad, custom team uniforms build identity and pride. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom team uniforms from 50 pieces with sublimation printing, embroidery, and professional construction that stands up to season after season of competition.

Who Orders Custom Team Uniforms

  • Sports Clubs: Soccer, basketball, cricket, rugby, volleyball, baseball
  • Schools and Universities: Physical education programs, varsity teams, intramural leagues
  • Corporate Teams: Company sports days, charity runs, corporate leagues
  • Esports Organizations: Gaming jerseys for tournaments and streaming
  • Martial Arts Academies: Training gear and competition uniforms

Types of Team Uniforms We Manufacture

  • Soccer Kits: Jersey, shorts, socks — full sublimation or embroidered badges
  • Basketball Uniforms: Reversible jerseys, matching shorts, warm-up sets
  • Cricket Whites and Colored Kits: Traditional whites or modern T20 colored kits
  • Corporate Polos and Sports Shirts: Branded workwear for team events

Sublimation vs Embroidery vs Screen Print

MethodBest ForDurabilityColors
SublimationAll-over designs, jerseysPermanent (dye in fiber)Unlimited
EmbroideryBadges, crests, logosExtremely durableLimited
Screen PrintNumbers, names, simple logosGood1-6

MOQ and Pricing

Minimum order: 50 pieces per design. Individual names and numbers included at no extra cost for sublimation orders. Bulk pricing available for orders over 200 pieces.

Design Requirements

Send us your design file (AI, EPS, PDF, or high-res PNG) with player names and numbers in a spreadsheet. We'll create a digital mockup for approval before production.

Why FABRIOZA for Team Uniforms

ISO 9001 certified quality, 50-piece MOQ, professional sublimation and embroidery, individual names/numbers included, durable construction for active wear, and DDP shipping to your location.

Get Your Team Uniformed in Custom, Branded Kit

50-piece minimum. Free mockup. Names and numbers included. Quote in 24 hours.

Order Team Uniforms →

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for team uniforms?

50 pieces per design. You can mix sizes from Youth XS to Adult 4XL.

Can each player have a different name and number?

Yes, individual names and numbers are included at no extra cost on sublimation orders.

Do you provide size sets for fitting?

Yes, we offer complete size run samples so your team can try before bulk production.

Can you match our team colors exactly?

Yes, we work with Pantone color matching to ensure your team colors are replicated perfectly.

How long does production take?

Samples: typically 1-3 weeks. Bulk: 2-3 weeks after sample approval.
